transcripts.title: How to charge EV with Shell recharge app
transcripts.transcript:
hi there just got an EV and wondering
how to charge it with a shell recharge
app don't worry I'll guide you through
the entire process step by step let's
get started first download the shell
recharge app from your app store
available for both IOS and Android once
installed open the app and create an
account enter your email create a secure
password and complete the verification
process by checking your inbox for a
confirmation email already have an
account just log in with your details
before charging add a payment method tap
on the payment option in the app menu
and link your Preferred Card or digital
wallet make sure the details are
accurate to avoid hiccups at the station
now you're all set to pay seamlessly to
find a charging station tap the map icon
on the home screen the app will display
all nearby shell recharge stations you
can filter by charger type availability
and connector type to match your vehicle
once you find a station tap it to see
details like pricing and charging speeds
now let's plug in first connect the
charger to your EV then open the app and
select the station your app enter the
station ID or scan the QR code on the
charger tap start charging and the app
will activate the charger for you
charging will begin shortly want to keep
track the app displays real time updates
on your charging session including time
elapsed energy delivered and cost once
your EV is charged stop the session via
the app unplug the charger and you're
good to go the payment is processed
automatically and you'll receive a
receipt in the app for your records
congratulations you've just completed
your first charging session with the
shell recharge app it's simple
convenient and perfect for Ev drivers on
the go thanks for watching and happy
charging
